notes: V1 uses conservative exposure and leverage.
Funding is modeled conservatively until a full futures dataset exists.
Any harmful side imbalance should move that side to needs_rework.
Dynamic sizing improved the broad drawdown profile.
The rebuilt short module now stays out of weak setups, so the current candidate behaves as a long-biased futures baseline.
Short-side logic still needs separate validation before it should be treated as active edge.
